fixtures._comment: chat-css D5 probe (d5-chat-css.ts) — single turn. The probe asserts the HALCYON CSS theme is applied (fonts + ember border); the reply content is neutral chat. context:hermes isolates per-integration.

response.content: The chat is re-themed entirely through theme.css, scoped to .chat-css-demo-scope so the styling never leaks. The HALCYON editorial look uses parchment tones, a serif assistant voice, and a mono user transmission with an ember accent.
